title: Skills: Vanilla
description: Add vanilla compatible skills to minecraft.
body:
Skills: Vanilla is an official plugin of [Sk1llful](https://modrinth.com/mod/sk1llful).

The mod introduces basic attribute skills such as strength, constitution, will, and agility, and practical skills such as archery, throwing, swimming, and concealment.

Players can upgrade their skills and get better attributes through special training, eating specific foods, and getting enough sleep.

 

ATTENTION:
[Sk1llful](https://modrinth.com/mod/sk1llful) is needed as a mandatory dependency.
[Max Health Fixer](https://maven.nova-committee.cn/releases/committee/nova/MaxHealthFixerFg1710/1.7.10-1.0.0/MaxHealthFixerFg1710-1.7.10-1.0.0.jar) is recommended to be installed as well, see [MC-17876](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-17876).
You **DEFINITELY CAN** add the mod to your modpack.
